title: Vericiguat bulk — Chapter 29 at 6.5% MFN (same-letter form gate)
source: CROSS NY N318947 (14 May 2021) — Vericiguat bulk → 2933.59.5300, 6.5% ad valorem; not listed in Pharmaceutical Appendix. Same letter also classifies Verquvo tablets under 3004 Free.

value_note.contrast: Same letter: Verquvo tablets → 3004.90.9220 Free. Real base-MFN delta on one CROSS page — preference/appendix may still erase by origin; cite base MFN, not guaranteed savings
